completed_slice: Wire the independent exact-commit preflight artifact verifier into the Cloudflare environment preflight workflow before artifact upload.
blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN configuration before deployment and hostname proof can complete.
next_action: Observe or dispatch the exact-commit environment preflight workflow, download its retained artifact, confirm cloudflare-environment-preflight-verdict.json reports repository_declarations_verified, then dispatch the production deployment workflow only after credentials are configured.
